settings.title:
We Build Your Dream Home.
We Build to Last.

settings.editor: Construction & remodeling experts in Jacksonville, FL. From LVP flooring and kitchen makeovers to fences, pergolas, and full home additions — luxury in every detail.

settings.description_text: Luxury Vinyl Plank installation — durable, waterproof, and beautiful. Perfect for Florida homes.
Complete kitchen transformations — cabinetry, countertops, backsplash, and layout redesigns.
Professional exterior painting that protects and elevates your home's curb appeal.
Installation, repair, and finishing — seamless walls and ceilings with impeccable results.
Custom fencing and pergolas that transform your outdoor space into a true extension of your home.
Acoustic tile installation and removal — modern, clean ceilings for homes and offices.
Full bath renovations — tile, vanities, showers, and flooring. Your personal spa awaits.
Expanding your living space with structural additions — rooms, sunrooms, and more.
Custom mudroom organizers, entertainment centers, and storage solutions built to fit your space.

settings.editor: A curated selection of our recent construction and remodeling work across Jacksonville and Central Florida.
Full remodel — new cabinets, countertops & backsplash · Jacksonville, FL
Luxury Vinyl Plank throughout main level · 2,100 sq ft
Full exterior repaint + trim · Immediate curb appeal boost
Call or message us. We discuss your vision, needs, and budget — no pressure, no obligation.
We visit your property, take measurements, and deliver a transparent itemized quote.
Our skilled crew starts on schedule. You get daily updates and zero surprises.
We walk you through every detail. 100% satisfied? Then the job is done right.

settings.title:
We Don't Just Build.
We Transform.

settings.editor: Based in Jacksonville, FL — we've been crafting quality construction and remodeling projects for homeowners across the region. Solid construction, impeccable finishes, and a team that treats your home like their own.

settings.description_text: Full licensing and insurance coverage gives you complete peace of mind throughout every project.
No hidden fees, no surprises. You get a detailed quote before any work begins — and we stick to it.
We respect your time. Timelines are commitments, not suggestions. We finish when we say we will.
We serve Jacksonville's English and Spanish-speaking communities. Communication is always clear.

settings.editor: C&J completely transformed our kitchen. The craftsmanship is unreal — every detail was perfect. They finished on time and the price was exactly what they quoted. 100% recommend!
We got the LVP flooring done throughout the whole first floor. The team was professional, fast, and incredibly clean. The floors look absolutely stunning.
They built our pergola and installed new fence — the backyard is now our favorite place. Communication was excellent, and they cleaned up everything perfectly.
